description: Style NoteElevate your style to become the envy of the fashion crowd with this toniq bangle set. Clash them with your season essentials for a unique twist. Product DetailsFour bangles with gold base and sidesConsists of two slim bangles in pink and black with a gold base and sides, one wider white bangle with gold base and sides and one gold coloured bangle Material and CarePlastic, metalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeDiameter: 6 cm
